conservative.name: Defy Undeath
conservative.requirements: 7 favour. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before invoking this blessing

success.description: You invoke the blessing and undead within close range may not engage you or come closer to you until your next turn

boon.description: All allies within medium range may recover 1 stress

bane.description: Place 1 less recharge token on this card

challenge.description: Effect: A chanted prayer to Morr weakens the undead in the area. While this card is recharging, undead within close range of you suffer to all checks, undead within medium range of you suffer to all checks, and undead within long range suffer to all checks (these effects are not cumulative)

reckless.name: Defy Undeath
reckless.requirements: 7 favour. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before invoking this blessing

success.description: You invoke the blessing and may remove a Recharge token immediately

boon.description: All undead within close range gain the Demoralized condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: All allies within close range suffer 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: This blessing inflicts 2 wounds each time a Recharge token is removed, rather than 1
